audit_methodology: read-only static + run-provenance; no rerun; no historic verdict modification; merge-time snapshot evidence only; current master forbidden as historical evidence
tier_scheme: Tier 1 — Universal formal validity blockers (always Class A if proven)
Tier 2 — Contemporaneous contract checks (Class A only if PR's own design memo bound it and it was violated)
Tier 3 — Forward hardening (NOT auto-Class-A or auto-Class-C; absence that blocks Tier 1/2 verification → Class U)
outcome_ladder_disallowed_labels: PASS_TABULAR_EVIDENCE_RECONFIRMED (read-only audit cannot make empirical reconfirmation claim)
scope_completeness_narrative: All 9 candidate β-evals confirmed as formal β-eval squash-merges with eval_report.md + script + tests committed. No additional formal β-evals discovered in routing-memo evidence pictures beyond the 9. No candidate PR requires exclusion as non-β-eval.

C-se-r7a-replica — 2nd anchor; Fix A row-set isolation introduced

C-d1-target-control — 6th anchor; Option 9c per-target baseline JSON committed; R-T3 = FALSIFIED_under_T3

supporting_dependency_inventory_wording_: Every 'static_contamination_status' field below describes the result of static contract inspection at each merge-time snapshot. The static-clean finding does NOT remove the structural Class U on run-provenance (U-1 / U-2). Actual historical execution remains unverified where committed machine-readable artifacts / sanity-probe outputs are absent. The aggregate outcome remains TARGETED_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED. Wording such as 'empirically clean across all 9 PRs' / 'historical execution verified' / 'tabular evidence reconfirmed' / 'prior verdicts formally revalidated' is NOT used.

aggregate_narrative: Static-code clean across 9 PRs × 9 dimensions under each PR's own merged design memo. No formal validity blocker (Class A). All 9 PRs are PR_TARGETED_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED due to structural Class U on artifact run-provenance (U-1: machine-readable sweep_results / aggregate / val_selected / sanity_probe gitignored across all merge SHAs; U-2: sanity-probe PASS not independently verifiable). One supporting-dependency Class B finding (citation drift in Phase 28 closure + Phase 29 post-29.0a routing memos for 27.0b/c/e-β; does NOT modify any β-eval verdict; affects downstream traceability only). Aggregate outcome cannot be STATIC_REVIEW_NO_BLOCKER_FOUND because that label requires zero unresolved Class U.

a0_broad_status.rev2_alpha_amendment_pr_status: deferred per user instruction; not opened in this audit PR

routing_recommendations.label: Targeted artifact regeneration for a single binding PR
routing_recommendations.description: Authorise a separate PR that re-runs the eval at the merge SHA (or a re-pinned reproducible snapshot) and commits sweep_results.parquet + aggregate_summary.json + val_selected_cell.json + sanity_probe.json for ONE PR; cross-check against committed eval_report.md numerics.

routing_recommendations.label: Targeted artifact regeneration for the full spine
routing_recommendations.description: Same as U-1 but applied across all 9 PRs. High cost; only justified if multiple downstream commitments require the full ceiling.

routing_recommendations.label: Re-resume A0-broad against existing Class-U tabular ceiling
routing_recommendations.description: A0-broad re-resumption per PR #355 amendment spec proceeds without first regenerating tabular artifacts; formal H-D2 comparator (C-sb-baseline-aligned) is computed inside β v2 run. Class U on Phase 27-29 tabular run-provenance does not directly block A0-broad re-resumption under this routing.

routing_recommendations.label: Doc-only correction of citation drift in Phase 28 closure + Phase 29 post-29.0a routing memos
routing_recommendations.description: Independent of any β resumption; corrects 27.0b/c/e-β PR citations (#311 → #318, #319 → #321, #327 → #328); cheap; clarifies downstream traceability.
